Off Calendar May-07-2024 Continued To Jun-18-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 19, 2019 is admitted to probate. Iddo Johannes Van Spill is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 07, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior, no appearance will be required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed Probate Referree.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: M. Svahlin. Not reported.
